subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which Thou hast made me the Sustainer of the Names and their Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به جعلتنی قیوما علی الاسماء و مظهر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for teaching, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power of the Manifestation of God
